styleGuide: STRICT CHARACTER MODEL — keep IDENTICAL to the reference images. Sidekick, a chunky squat glossy soft-vinyl 'Gloob'. Warm MUTED golden-amber yellow body (~#DC933F — NOT bright lemon/canary/neon, NOT oversaturated), lighter warm highlights, soft orange shadows. Big round head ~45% of height; two smooth rounded bear ears at the upper corners; a small crest of ~5 rounded bumps along the top-center of the head. Two SIMPLE flat jet-black (#141414) almond eyes set fairly wide, each with only a tiny pinpoint highlight (NOT large, NOT sparkly, no white eye-whites). One wide open happy smile low-center, soft red-pink (#C0413A) interior, a few rounded pearl-white (#F5F4ED) teeth (two prominent upper teeth). Short rounded arms with round nub-fingered paws, stubby legs, glossy pearl-white toe-beads, small tail. Smooth glossy vinyl, soft studio lighting. MATCH the exact design, color, proportions, material and finish of the reference images — change ONLY the pose/prop/scene/color noted in the request. Do NOT brighten or oversaturate the yellow, do NOT enlarge the eyes, do NOT alter the proportions. Full source of truth + variability rules: see .illustrate/sidekick-spec.md.
variable: Only these may change per request: body color (named friend variants only — keep the same muted saturation, no neon), expression (from the canonical set), pose, clothing/accessories/held props, small unique traits (sprout/blush/freckles/horn-bump/floppy-ears), and scene/background. Everything else is LOCKED.

character.transparency: gpt-image-2 is opaque — for transparent cutouts, prompt a flat magenta #FF00FF field and chroma-key it out via the script's --icon --chroma '#FF00FF'

notes: MODEL: use gpt-image-2 for EVERYTHING. CHARACTERS: attach the anchor+sheet refs and keep prompts on-model ('reproduce the EXACT character in the references', name only the pose/prop). gpt-image-2 has no input_fidelity, so lean on the refs + tight prompts and VALIDATE one render before batching (regenerate on drift). gpt-image-2 is opaque — get transparent cutouts via chroma-key (render on flat magenta #FF00FF, script --icon --chroma '#FF00FF'). GROUP/DIVERSE SCENES: gpt-image-2 + the character sheet ref (variety described in the prompt). ICONS: coordinated BRIGHT palette (see iconPalette) — TEXT-ONLY, no refs (icon-style-color.txt) so color isn't pulled toward Sidekick's yellow; one bright hue per icon, flat white bg, no faces.
